text:
FEEL_BAD_FREQ_CD FEEL_BAD_FREQ_CD D0150F2 Mood: Feeling bad about yourself: Freq CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates how often the resident, over the past two weeks, has been feeling bad about themselves. 0=Never or 1 day
1=2-6 days (several days)
2=7-11 days (half or more of the days)
3=12-14 days (nearly every day) effective 10/01/2023
877 TRBLE_CNCNTRTN_CD TRBLE_CNCNTRTN_CD D0150G1 Mood: Trouble concentrating on things: Pres CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident,
